username.title: Username
username.description: Username to connect to Snowflake. This user should have privileges to read all the metadata in Snowflake.

account.title: Account
account.description: If the Snowflake URL is https://xyz1234.us-east-1.gcp.snowflakecomputing.com, then the account is xyz1234.us-east-1.gcp

database.title: Database
database.description: Database of the data source. This is optional parameter, if you would like to restrict the metadata reading to a single database. When left blank, OpenMetadata Ingestion attempts to scan all the databases.

queryTag.title: Query Tag
queryTag.description: Session query tag used to monitor usage on snowflake. To use a query tag snowflake user should have enough privileges to alter the session.

accountUsageSchema.title: Account Usage Schema Name
accountUsageSchema.description: Full name of the schema where the account usage data is stored.

privateKey.title: Private Key
privateKey.description: Connection to Snowflake instance via Private Key

snowflakePrivatekeyPassphrase.title: Snowflake Passphrase Key
snowflakePrivatekeyPassphrase.description: Snowflake Passphrase Key used with Private Key

includeTransientTables.title: Include Transient Tables
includeTransientTables.description: Ingest transient tables alongside permanent ones.

includeStreams.title: Include Streams
includeStreams.description: Ingest Snowflake streams as data assets.

clientSessionKeepAlive.title: Client Session Keep Alive
clientSessionKeepAlive.description: Keep the session alive for long-running scans.

useAccessHistory.title: Use Access History for Lineage
useAccessHistory.description: Use Snowflake's ACCOUNT_USAGE.ACCESS_HISTORY view as the source of query lineage. ACCESS_HISTORY provides Snowflake-computed table- and column-level lineage, including for queries OpenMetadata cannot parse. Enabled by default; if the configured role cannot read ACCESS_HISTORY, ingestion automatically falls back to the legacy query-log parser.

accessHistoryChunkSize.title: Access History Chunk Size (Days)
accessHistoryChunkSize.description: Number of days of ACCESS_HISTORY scanned per query when 'Use Access History for Lineage' is enabled. The lineage time window is split into chunks of this many days to keep each Snowflake query bounded and avoid client/server timeouts over long windows. Lower this value if queries still time out on very busy accounts.

schemaFilterPattern.title: Default Schema Filter Pattern
schemaFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude schemas that matches the pattern.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude tables that matches the pattern.

databaseFilterPattern.title: Default Database Filter Pattern
databaseFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude databases that matches the pattern.

storedProcedureFilterPattern.title: Default Stored Procedure Filter Pattern
storedProcedureFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude stored procedures that matches the pattern.

creditCost.title: Cost of Credit
creditCost.description: Cost of credit for the Snowflake account.

snowflakeSourceHost.title: Snowflake Source Host
snowflakeSourceHost.description: Snowflake source host for the Snowflake account.

policyAgentConfig.title: Policy Agent Config
policyAgentConfig.description: Policy agent configuration for access control extraction.
